language_decision.source_sample: DeepSurge browser snapshot exposes English event details, tracks, resources, and submission affordance.

wallet_path: No P0 wallet path. The judge does not claim, mint, pay, trade, or sign an owned chain object in the submitted demo.
no_wallet_exception: Valid no-wallet exception: the P0 result is server-issued and verifier oriented. An anonymous judge creates a session-scoped Memory Will, the server writes it through the Walrus Publisher, and the judge inspects the returned Walrus blob id plus Sui object metadata without signing or owning an asset.
demo_signer_policy: No browser signer or private key is exposed in P0. If a future owned Memory Will attestation is added, wallet connect -> sign -> transaction becomes mandatory before any public claim.
frontend: Next.js App Router + React + Radix Themes + bespoke Memory Will state components
storage: Walrus publisher/aggregator stores MemoryWill, TaskCheckpoint, DelegationPolicy, RedactionLog, SuccessorReplayTrace, and Receipt payloads on the critical path; local project state only preserves the current demo session and receipt history.
real_data_source: Judge input, OpenAI-compatible live model output, Walrus write/read blob records, and Sui testnet object metadata for Walrus proof inspection.

real_data_sources.name: Walrus Publisher HTTP API
real_data_sources.product_use: POST /api/memory-wills writes the Memory Will JSON to /v1/blobs?epochs=1 before successor restore is enabled.

real_data_sources.name: Walrus Aggregator HTTP API
real_data_sources.product_use: POST /api/successor/restore reads the Walrus blob by blob id before asking the successor model to continue.

real_data_sources.name: OpenAI-compatible Chat Completions
real_data_sources.product_use: src/lib/memory-will/agent.ts generates role-specific successor output and records live agent runs.

real_data_sources.name: Sui testnet JSON-RPC
real_data_sources.product_use: src/lib/memory-will/sui-proof.ts reads Walrus Sui object metadata for the inspect proof surface and can be checked in a Sui explorer by runtime object id. The optional Move registry package in move/ can publish MemoryWillAnchor objects after a human-approved package publish.

deployment: Public web app target after local G4 verification; final host selected during G5.
delivery_mode_reason: Online hackathon judging needs one combined pitch plus live product recording so reviewers can understand the scene and inspect the working loop asynchronously.

required_env.name: OPENAI_API_KEY
required_env.status: configured in parent .env.shared for local verification; can also be supplied by deployment secrets

required_env.name: OPENAI_BASE_URL
required_env.status: configured by default OpenAI endpoint or OPENAI-compatible provider base URL

required_env.name: OPENAI_DEFAULT_MODEL
required_env.status: configured by OPENAI_DEFAULT_MODEL, STEPFUN_LLM_MODEL, or the app default

required_env.name: WALRUS_PUBLISHER_URL
required_env.status: configured in parent .env.shared for local verification

required_env.name: WALRUS_AGGREGATOR_URL
required_env.status: configured in parent .env.shared for local verification

required_env.name: SUI_TESTNET_RPC_URL
required_env.status: configured in parent .env.shared; app also has official Sui testnet RPC default

sponsor_technology.name: Walrus
sponsor_technology.primitive: HTTP publisher and aggregator blob storage, backed by Walrus Sui object ids
sponsor_technology.reviewer_visible_use: The Kill Agent flow writes a Memory Will to Walrus before the Open Cold Successor button appears; the inspect surface shows blob id and Sui object id.
sponsor_technology.proof: src/lib/memory-will/walrus.ts, src/app/api/memory-wills/route.ts, src/app/api/proof/[willId]/route.ts, and runtime case 'kill write restore receipt'

sponsor_technology.name: Sui
sponsor_technology.primitive: Sui JSON-RPC object metadata read for the Walrus object returned by the write path, plus a Sui Move MemoryWillAnchor registry package for an optional published anchor transaction.
sponsor_technology.reviewer_visible_use: The Inspect Proof panel reads the Walrus object metadata through Sui testnet RPC, names the Move registry state, and blocks success if no pointer exists.
sponsor_technology.proof: src/lib/memory-will/sui-proof.ts, src/lib/memory-will/sui-anchor.ts, move/sources/memory_will_registry.move, runtime case 'receipt reopen second context', and explorer template https://suiscan.xyz/testnet/object/{walrusObjectId}

feature_density.focused_surface_reason: The root route is the product workbench: it contains the kill action, scope controls, Walrus write, cold restore, mutation, receipt, and proof rail in one first-run surface.

user_case_beats.visible_state_change: agent status changes from checkpoint live to predecessor killed and local context goes to 0%
user_case_beats.backend_or_storage_evidence: src/app/memory-will-workbench.tsx state transition plus src/app/api/workspace/init/route.ts creates owned workspace

user_case_beats.user_action: click Write Memory Will after choosing role and redactions
user_case_beats.visible_state_change: Walrus pointer appears and Open Cold Successor becomes available
user_case_beats.backend_or_storage_evidence: src/lib/memory-will/walrus.ts writes /v1/blobs and src/lib/memory-will/store.ts saves receipt

user_case_beats.user_action: click Open Cold Successor and then switch successor role
user_case_beats.visible_state_change: successor output hash and role-specific output change
user_case_beats.backend_or_storage_evidence: src/lib/memory-will/agent.ts calls OpenAI-compatible chat.completions and appends .hunter/agent-runs.json

user_case_beats.user_action: open receipt in a second browser context and inspect proof
user_case_beats.visible_state_change: receipt reopens with blob id, role, redactions, replay, and Sui object proof
user_case_beats.backend_or_storage_evidence: src/app/api/memory-wills/[willId]/route.ts and src/app/api/proof/[willId]/route.ts read stored receipt and Walrus/Sui proof

why_this_stack: A TypeScript web app can ship the first-minute kill -> write -> restore -> receipt loop with browser smoke tests, while keeping proof inspection and degraded states visible. The selected product needs live AI behavior and a Walrus durable object primitive, so branch is BOTH.

deploy.cloudflare_override_reason: G5 public smoke uses a Cloudflare quick tunnel in front of a local Next production server. Stable Cloudflare Pages/Workers deployment is deferred because this Next app uses dynamic API routes and local demo state; final judging should replace the temporary tunnel with a stable host.

cut_if_time_runs_out: deep Sui proof visualization beyond pointer/read status
